meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code to build SaaS products.
content.answer_block: To overcome a lack of portfolio, use Claude Code to rapidly scaffold and deploy functional, high-fidelity SaaS MVPs. By leveraging Antigravity to structure your architecture, you transform abstract ideas into production-ready code, creating tangible proof of your engineering velocity and product-market fit for potential investors or clients.
content.intro:
The silence of an empty portfolio is deafening for a founder. You have the vision, the business logic, and the drive, but you lack the visual evidence of your engineering prowess. In a market that demands instant validation, the 'no-portfolio' barrier is the single biggest friction point preventing you from closing your first high-ticket client.

We are shifting the paradigm today. By integrating Antigravity for architectural blueprints and Claude Code for rapid execution, you will stop building 'projects' and start architecting 'assets.' This workflow moves you from zero to a deployed, professional-grade SaaS application in hours, not weeks.

steps.title: Define the SaaS Architecture
steps.description: Establish the foundation. Use Antigravity to generate a robust schema and file structure that ensures your project is scalable and maintainable from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, modular project architecture for a SaaS MVP. Include database schema, API routes, and a folder structure optimized for a Next.js 14 stack.

steps.title: Configure Claude Code Environment
steps.description: Establish the Claude Code environment to ensure it understands your coding standards and project requirements for consistent, professional output.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a .claudecoderules file that enforces clean code, strict TypeScript types, and modular component design.

steps.title: Rapid Feature Scaffolding
steps.description: Transform your business requirements into functional code blocks. Focus on high-value features that demonstrate complex engineering, such as authentication and payment integration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a prompt to guide Claude in building a secure authentication flow using Supabase and Stripe checkout integration.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Implement authentication and stripe checkout based on the architecture defined in the root directory.'

steps.title: Automated Testing Suite
steps.description: A portfolio is only as strong as its reliability. Use Claude Code to generate unit and integration tests that prove your code is production-grade.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a test plan for the core business logic of the SaaS, including edge cases for billing and user permissions.

steps.title: Deployment and Documentation
steps.description: Finalize your build with a professional README and deployment pipeline. This turns a repository into a showcase product.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a professional README.md that highlights the technical stack, business problem solved, and instructions for local setup.
steps.claude_code_command: claude commit 'Finalize MVP build and documentation'

pro_tips: Treat your GitHub repo as a product page; include a live demo link in the top-level README to increase visitor retention.
Use Claude Code to refactor your own legacy code—it's a great way to show potential clients you can handle technical debt.
Focus on 'Hard Problems' like real-time data synchronization or complex state management; these carry more weight in a portfolio than basic CRUD apps.
Always commit with descriptive messages; recruiters and clients look at your commit history to judge professional discipline.
Utilize Antigravity to map out your database schema visually before coding; it shows you think about data integrity before writing a single line of logic.
content.next_steps: After completing your first project, deploy it to Vercel and share the link on your LinkedIn profile to begin attracting inbound leads.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect project to fall into your lap. Use these tools to build the evidence of your expertise and command the market's attention. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
